name: getgist
description: Reads Gist contacts, tags, segments, campaigns, forms, teammates, articles, collections, conversations, teams, workspace metadata, and e-commerce resources through the Gist REST API; writes regular JSON Gist resources and relationship actions.

risk.read: external Gist API reads of workspace, contact, marketing, conversation, team, knowledge base, and e-commerce data
risk.write: creates, updates, deletes, tags, subscribes, assigns, replies to, and otherwise mutates Gist workspace resources
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token
